category_sources: Official GitHub repository README documents the FASTQ utilities.
source_facts.description says fastq-tools provides utilities for working with FASTQ sequence files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is named dcjones/fastq-tools.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for fastq-tools.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/dcjones/fastq-tools, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists multiple fastq-* command-line tools.
